certificate.module_name: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Kernel Cryptographic API
certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode. The module generates random numbers whose strengths are modified by available entropy. No assurance of minimum security of SSPs (e.g., keys, bit strings) that are externally loaded, or of SSPs established with externally loaded SSPs
certificate.description: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Kernel Cryptographic API provides a C language API for use by other (kernel space and user space) processes that require cryptographic functionality
